allow: Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -H "Accept: application/json, */*" "https://www.jobserve.com/gb/en/JobServeHome.aspx?Keywords=BIM&Location=London&Radius=30&RSS=1")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { getPendingJobs, getStats } from './src/db.js'; const s = getStats\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({ totalJobs: s.totalJobs, jobsToday: s.jobsToday, sources: s.bySource.length, pendingCount: getPendingJobs\(\).length }, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import Database from 'better-sqlite3'; const db = new Database\('./data/jobs.db'\); const cols = db.prepare\('PRAGMA table_info\(jobs\)'\).all\(\).map\(r => r.name\); console.log\(cols.join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(ssh root@77.42.70.26 'pm2 status; echo "---NGINX---"; systemctl status nginx --no-pager | head -20; echo "---PORTS---"; ss -ltnp | grep -E ":80|:3099|:443"; echo "---DASHBOARD LOGS---"; pm2 logs dashboard --lines 30 --nostream --err')

Bash(ssh root@77.42.70.26 'docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Ports}}\\t{{.Status}}"; echo "---ENV---"; grep -E "DASHBOARD" /opt/job-alert-bot/.env 2>/dev/null || echo "no DASHBOARD_* in .env"')

Bash(ssh root@77.42.70.26 'docker inspect bep-generator-nginx-1 --format "{{range .Mounts}}{{.Source}} -> {{.Destination}}{{println}}{{end}}"; echo "---"; docker inspect bep-generator-nginx-1 --format "{{.HostConfig.NetworkMode}} / host.docker.internal: {{range .HostConfig.ExtraHosts}}{{.}} {{end}}"; echo "---COMPOSE---"; find /opt /root /home -name "docker-compose*.y*ml" 2>/dev/null | head -5')
Bash(ssh root@77.42.70.26 'echo "===default.conf==="; cat /opt/bep-generator/nginx/conf.d/default.conf; echo; echo "===noeinsol.conf==="; cat /opt/bep-generator/nginx/conf.d/noeinsol.conf')
Bash(ssh root@77.42.70.26 'pm2 status; echo "---"; ss -ltnp | grep 3099; echo "---"; pm2 logs dashboard --lines 5 --nostream')

Bash(ssh root@77.42.70.26 'cd /opt/job-alert-bot && pm2 delete dashboard && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only dashboard && pm2 save --force; sleep 2; echo "---"; pm2 status; echo "---PORT---"; ss -ltnp | grep 3099; echo "---LOGS---"; tail -3 logs/dashboard-out.log')
